name: Port Lavaca / Matagorda Bay KOA Holiday
description: Come play pickleball at Port Lavaca / Matagorda Bay KOA Holiday in Port Lavaca, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Free for Registered Guests. $10 per person for Day Pass. $50 for 4 Sunday Funday Day Passes which includes: 2 Free Hunt Bros Pizzas and access to all campground amenities.
